name: Mashed Potatoes with Horseradish
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes.
2. Cook in boiling salted water in a medium-size saucepan until tender, then drain.
3. Mash the potatoes, adding 1 tablespoon butter and pepper.
4. Add sour cream, horseradish, and minced parsley. Whip as for mashed potatoes.
5. Place in serving bowl; top with 1 tablespoon melted butter and serve.
